perspectives.description: The DECIDER is the friend who has developed romantic feelings and is contemplating whether to reveal these feelings to their long-time friend, who is in a happy relationship.
The PRIMARY_AFFECTED is the friend who is currently in a happy relationship and may be impacted by the revelation of romantic feelings, potentially affecting their relationship and friendship.

The THIRD_PARTY is a mutual friend who may witness the fallout of the DECIDER's decision, feeling the emotional strain of the situation without having direct involvement in the decision-making process.
